use_cases: Personal task management and daily to-do tracking
Sprint planning and developer workflow organization
Goal completion tracking with celebration feedback
Project milestone management for dev teams
Daily standup preparation and task review
ai_summary: A modern task management card component featuring real-time date/time display, interactive checkbox toggles, and a celebratory confetti animation when all tasks are completed. Designed with a clean minimalist aesthetic using Tailwind CSS, this component is ideal for developer productivity workflows and personal task tracking, with colorful accent colors for the celebration effect that triggers on 100% completion.
